name: Imaging QC and Reproducible Analysis
summary: Run controlled imaging quality-control and derived-measure workflows.
clinical_goal: Support reproducible imaging review for research or follow-up cohorts.

inputs.name: imaging_study_ids
inputs.description: Identifiers for the studies selected for QC or reproducible analysis.

inputs.name: dicom_metadata
inputs.description: Series- and instance-level metadata used to route quality-control logic.

inputs.name: batch_criteria
inputs.description: Cohort or batch selection rules supplied by an operator.

outputs.name: qc_summary
outputs.description: Human-reviewable quality-control summary for each study or batch.

outputs.name: derived_measurements
outputs.description: Observation-ready derived metrics from the reproducible analysis flow.

target_mappings.notes: Numeric result candidates; no automatic filing in Week 1.

review.notes: Any derived metrics require human review before export or filing.

failure_policies.condition: The selected study lacks metadata needed for QC routing.
failure_policies.action: Mark the run failed with explicit missing-metadata details.

failure_policies.condition: The execution environment cannot access the required QC or analysis tool.
failure_policies.action: Return a dry-run plan and do not simulate results.
